interface.longDescription: Unica teaches Codex practical 1C:Enterprise development operations: creating and editing metadata, forms, roles, SKD and MXL layouts, building EPF/ERF artifacts, creating and updating infobases, debugging autonomous web-client/runtime contours, and searching, reviewing, diagnosing, testing, and optimizing BSL code. Pinned bundled tools and MCP servers are kept as internal infrastructure behind checksum-verifying launchers.
defaultPrompt: Создай внешнюю обработку 1С и собери EPF
Добавь объект метаданных и форму в конфигурацию 1С
Найди код в 1С-проекте и проверь модуль на ошибки
